NAME: SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_2_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = 0 minutes 
10 = 10 minutes 
20 = 20 minutes 
30 = 30 minutes 
40 = 40 minutes 
50 = 50 minutes 
60 = 60 minutes 
90 = 90 minutes 
120 = 120 minutes 
150 = 150 minutes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening.
